# Wrf

**Summary**: A numerical weather prediction model used to produce three-dimensional gridded meteorology.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-mustapha|Mustapha, 2022]] used WRF to provide high-resolution mesoscale meteorological data for the AERMOD model.

## Key Results and Findings

- WRF is currently the gold standard for numerical weather prediction, capable of producing 3D gridded meteorology. ([[2022-mustapha|Mustapha, 2022, p. 21]])
